APPROVE
The bead has no explicit acceptance criteria; it is an investigation/documentation task capturing a benchmark divergence. The merge commit 28aea98 brings in ce127cf which documents the vidar reasoning-stall on log-summary-date-ranges, matching the bead's stated purpose.
